color_scheme.label: Site Color scheme
color_scheme.info: Only for new users who haven't chosen a color scheme or for no-js mode.

colors_text.label: Text
colors_text.info: Used as foreground color on background colors.

colors_background_overlay.label: Overlay
colors_background_overlay.info: Applied in sections with the overlay opacity setting.

color_alert.label: Alert
color_alert.info: Applied for sale link in header, alert messages and log out button.

type_header_font.label: Font
type_header_font.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

type_header_font_card.label: Heading font
type_header_font_card.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

type_text_font_card.label: Description font
type_text_font_card.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

type_price_font_card.label: Price font
type_price_font_card.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

type_badges_font_card.label: Badges font
type_badges_font_card.info: Applies to Sale, Sold out and New badges.

type_body_font.label: Font
type_body_font.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

type_subtitle_font.label: Font
type_subtitle_font.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

type_button_font.label: Font
type_button_font.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

type_header_menu_font.label: Main font
type_header_menu_font.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

type_footer_menu_font.label: Links font
type_footer_menu_font.info: Selecting a different font can affect the speed of your store. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

type_accent_font.label: Accent font
type_accent_font.info: Used for badges, banners, Banner slider section and Countdown section. [Learn more about system fonts.](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/os/store-speed/improving-speed#fonts)

badge_custom_show.label: Show custom badge
badge_custom_show.info: Need to add a metafield "custom.badges" with type "Single line text" in Shopify admin. [About metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields)

new_badge_days.label: Show period of New badge (days)
new_badge_days.info: The number of days is counted from the product publish date.

card_swatch_display_mode.label: Swatches display mode
card_swatch_display_mode.info: In "Compact" mode, a maximum of 5 swatches for "Standard" cards, and a maximum of 2 swatches for "Small" cards.

enable_color_swatch.label: Enable color swatches
enable_color_swatch.info: Color swatches will be shown for the option set in "Swatch trigger". The theme supports values from [category metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields/category-metafields/using-category-metafields).

custom_colors.label: Custom colors
custom_colors.info: Each color must be in its own line, like "Red: #ff0000". You can also use CSS Gradient.

favicon.label: Favicon image
favicon.info: Will be scaled down to 32 x 32px

paragraph__intro.content: Settings apply to the product card.

show_on_mobile.label: Enable "Quick View" / "Quick Buy" button on mobile devices

predictive_search_enabled.label: Enable predictive search for "Search" and "404" pages

pagination_type.label: Pagination type
pagination_type.info: Pagination type for pages of collections and blogs.

settings.paragraph: Cart and checkout prices always show currency codes. Example: $1.00 USD.

cart_type.label: Type
cart_type.info: Drawer will be enabled on all pages except the cart.

title_empty_cart_drawer.label: Empty cart heading
title_empty_cart_drawer.info: If not entered, the default value will be used.
title_empty_cart_drawer.default: Don't miss out on the best deals!

text_empty_cart_drawer.label: Empty cart text
text_empty_cart_drawer.default: Your cart may be empty now, but let us help you fill it up with amazing products.

button_link_empty_cart_drawer.label: Empty cart button link
button_link_empty_cart_drawer.info: If not entered, the default value will be used.

show_shipping.label: Show free shipping message
show_shipping.info: Will be enabled automatically in the Cart drawer. To display it on the cart page add the "Free shipping message" block.

message_shipping.label: Message
message_shipping.info: Use [amount] to display progress towards free shipping.

min_spend.label: Minimum spend for free shipping
min_spend.info: In store currency "Store settings → Store details → Shop currency". Currency conversion will be applied for the customer.
min_spend.content: It is recommended to [create a discount for free shipping](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/discounts/discount-types/free-shipping) or [create a free shipping rate](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/fulfillment/setup/shipping-rates/flat-shipping-rates#create-free-shipping-rates) in the store.

products_tab_cart_drawer_1.label: Tab 1
products_tab_cart_drawer_1.info: Displayed if both product lists are not empty

products_tab_cart_drawer_2.label: Tab 2
products_tab_cart_drawer_2.info: Displayed if both product lists are not empty

links_blank.label: Open external menu links in a new tab

button_label.label: Button label
button_label.info: If the button label is empty, the button will not be displayed.

prefix.label: Prefix
prefix.info: Only displayed if heading is entered.

suffix.label: Suffix
suffix.info: Only displayed if heading is entered.

heading.label: Heading
heading.info: To add an underline, select the text and press Ctrl + U for Windows and Linux or Cmd + U for Mac.

aspect_ratio.label: Aspect ratio
aspect_ratio.info: When "Adapt to image" option is selected, the aspect ratio applies to the highest image in the blocks.

mobile_tablet_aspect_ratio.label: Aspect ratio on mobile and tablet devices

enable_animation.label: Enable animation
enable_animation.info: The animation is only enabled on screens that are 750 pixels or wider.

show_video.label: Show video
show_video.info: If this setting is enabled and a video is selected, the image will not be displayed.

section_height.label: Cards container desktop height
section_height.info: Applies to all layout types except Columns.

text.default: Here can be a short description explaining the content of this banner.

prefix.label: Prefix
prefix.info: Only displayed if heading is entered.

suffix.label: Suffix
suffix.info: Only displayed if heading is entered.

mobile_aspect_ratio.label: Card aspect ratio on mobile devices

video.info: If a video is selected, images will not be displayed.

background_type.label: Background type
background_type.info: Background is covered by selected image in "Banner", "Bar" and "Compact bar" layouts.

mobile_horizontal_content_alignment.label: Mobile horizontal alignment
mobile_horizontal_content_alignment.info: Does not apply to "Split image" layout.

mobile_vertical_content_alignment.label: Mobile vertical alignment
mobile_vertical_content_alignment.info: Does not apply to "Split image" layout.

description_promo.default: Here can be a short description explaining the content of this promo banner.

description.default: Here can be a short overview of the brands you offer, helping customers explore high-quality products from names they trust.

placeholder.label: Placeholder
placeholder.info: Displayed if no image is selected.

image_ratio.label: Aspect ratio
image_ratio.info: Only for the "Overlay" layout. For "Cards" layout, it will be calculated authomatically.

show_desc.info: 120 characters max. Only for standard product card.

paragraph__1.content: Dynamic recommendations use order and product information to change and improve over time. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/product-recommendations)

mobile_cards_layout.label: Mobile cards layout
mobile_cards_layout.info: Cards displaying and interraction type on mobile

columns_per_line.label: Media to show
columns_per_line.info: Displays only the specified number of media items for the Grid gallery layout.

custom_products.label: Overwrite products
custom_products.info: Selected product list will be displayed instead of the products in the collection

info_desktop_ratio.content: On desktop devices the height of the block will depend on the height of product cards "Theme settings → Product card → Image ratio"

description_promo.default: Here can be a short description explaining the content of this promo card.

info.content: Displayed only when "Promo card" blocks are disabled or not added.

collection_heading.info: If not entered, the collection title will be used.

collection_description.default: Here can be a short description explaining the collection.

text.label: Main text
text.default: Here can be a short promotional message

text_mobile.label: Main text on mobile
text_mobile.info: If empty, the main text will be used.

include_margins.label: Make section margins the same as theme

image.label: Image
image.info: Only applicable when the "With image" layout is selected

rating_app.label: Use rating from the app
rating_app.info: An rating app is required for this setting to work. If this setting is enabled, the Review score setting will not work. The product must be selected.

description.default: Use this space to highlight insightful articles, news, or updates from your blog.

show_video_icon.label: Show video icon
show_video_icon.info: To display the icon, you need to add the custom.video_icon metafield with the type "True or false" in Shopify admin. [About metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields)

custom_boolean_metafield.label: Boolean metafield
custom_boolean_metafield.info: Link a true/false Metafield as a dynamic source.

secondary_heading.label: Secondary heading
secondary_heading.default: Add a Title Here to Introduce Your FAQ Section

buttons_show.label: Show buttons "Load More" and "Hide"
buttons_show.info: If enabled, displays 4 blocks by default.

question.default: Here can be a commonly asked question about your product or service.

answer.default: Here can be a brief but clear response to the question, giving customers a quick answer without unnecessary details.

description.default: Here can be a description explaining the purpose of the image, whether it’s showcasing a product, telling a brand story, or highlighting a campaign.

aspect_ratio.info: For image position "Left" and "Right", the image will stretch to the full height of the text content.

heading.default: Here You Can Write a Bold and Friendly Title Encouraging Users to Reach Out

description.default: Use this area to briefly explain what kind of help your team offers — such as product questions, returns, shipping info, or general support.

heading_form.label: Heading
heading_form.default: Encourage Users to Fill Out the Form

text_form.label: Description
text_form.default: Explain that the form is for questions, feedback, or help — and you’ll reply soon.

custom_icon.label: Custom icon
custom_icon.info: Replaces the default icon from the Icon setting.

header__3.info: To add a country/region, go to your [markets settings.](/admin/settings/markets)

header__4.info: To add a language, go to your [language settings](/admin/settings/languages).

header__5.info: To add payment methods, go to your [payments settings](/admin/settings/payments).

header__7.info: To add store policies, go to your [policy settings](/admin/settings/legal).

subscribe_paragraph.content: When customers subscribe to emails, customer accounts are created. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/customers)

description.default: Use this space for a short company tagline or mission statement.

heading.label: Heading
heading.info: A heading is required to display the menu.

default_open.label: Menu on mobile devices is open by default

logo_2.label: Dark mode logo image
logo_2.info: Recommended uploading a dark mode logo with the same height as the logo image.

menu.label: Main menu
menu.info: Displayed in the header on desktop devices and in the hamburger menu on mobile devices.

hide_bottom_row_on_scroll.label: Hide bottom row on scroll
hide_bottom_row_on_scroll.info: This feature is compatible only with the "Big" and "Medium" header layouts and the "Always" and "On scroll up" sticky header options. Applies only to screens wider than 1200px.

main_menu_sale_trigger.label: Sale link trigger
main_menu_sale_trigger.info: Write the exact name of the sale menu link to highlight it with options below.

main_menu_sale_icon.label: Add sale icon to sale link

enable_country_selector.label: Enable country/region selector
enable_country_selector.info: To add a country/region, go to your [markets settings.](/admin/settings/markets)

enable_language_selector.label: Enable language selector
enable_language_selector.info: To add a language, go to your [language settings](/admin/settings/languages).

contact_info.label: Contact info
contact_info.info: You can insert a link and use the prefixes "tel:" for phone numbers and "mailto:" for email instead of http:// in the Link field.

enable_search.label: Enable search
enable_search.info: If this option is disabled, settings below will not work.

search_banner_image_mobile.label: Background image in narrow search (optional)
search_banner_image_mobile.info: If selected, displayed when the search modal is less than 700px wide.

search_banner_aspect_ratio.label: Aspect ratio
search_banner_aspect_ratio.info: Applies when the search modal is more than 700px wide.

search_banner_aspect_ratio_mobile.label: Aspect ratio in narrow search
search_banner_aspect_ratio_mobile.info: Applies when the search modal is less than 700px wide.

search_banner_badge_prefix.label: Badge prefix
search_banner_badge_prefix.info: Only displayed if heading is entered.

search_banner_badge_suffix.label: Badge suffix
search_banner_badge_suffix.info: Only displayed if heading is entered.

shop_all_use_for_mega_menu.label: Use as trigger for shop mega menu
shop_all_use_for_mega_menu.info: If this option is enabled, this button will trigger the "Shop mega menu" section to open and "Button link" setting will be ignored.

info_text.content: To display this block, the "Enable search" setting must be enabled in the Header settings.

mega_menu_trigger.label: Trigger
mega_menu_trigger.info: Write the exact name of the menu link. For more information, visit [the documentation page.](https://apparentcollective.com/help-center/documentation/san-francisco/#header-mega)

mega_menu_info.content: If a menu trigger link has a submenu, it will not be displayed and will be replaced with cards from this block.

mega_menu_desktop_cards_per_row.label: Desktop cards per row
mega_menu_desktop_cards_per_row.info: Applies when the screen width is more than 1200px.

mega_menu_mobile_cards_per_row.label: Mobile cards per row
mega_menu_mobile_cards_per_row.info: Applies when the screen width is less than 1200px.

mega_menu_trigger.label: Trigger
mega_menu_trigger.info: Write the exact name of the menu link. For more information, visit [the documentation page.](https://apparentcollective.com/help-center/documentation/san-francisco/#header-mega)

mega_menu_info.content: If a menu trigger link has a submenu, it will not be displayed and will be replaced with tabs from this block.

info_text.content: To display this section, the "Use as trigger for shop mega menu" setting must be enabled in the "Header → Shop all button" settings.

tab_banner_image_narrow.label: Background image in narrow shop mega menu (optional)
tab_banner_image_narrow.info: If selected, displayed when the shop mega menu is less than 950px wide.

tab_banner_aspect_ratio.label: Aspect ratio
tab_banner_aspect_ratio.info: Applies when the shop mega menu is more than 950px wide.

tab_banner_aspect_ratio_narrow.label: Aspect ratio in narrow shop mega menu
tab_banner_aspect_ratio_narrow.info: Applies when the shop mega menu is less than 950px wide.

tab_banner_badge_prefix.label: Badge prefix
tab_banner_badge_prefix.info: Only displayed if heading is entered.

tab_banner_badge_suffix.label: Badge suffix
tab_banner_badge_suffix.info: Only displayed if heading is entered.

tab_custom_icon.label: Custom icon
tab_custom_icon.info: Replaces the default icon from the Icon setting.

trigger-open-delay.label: Time delay for a trigger open

trigger-close-delay.label: Time delay for a trigger close

close-scroll-position.label: Close scroll position
close-scroll-position.info: It is recommended that the value be greater than the "Open scroll position".

manual-selector.label: CSS selector for manual trigger
manual-selector.info: If the html element has buttons or links inside, then clicking on them will not work.

overlay-close.label: Click overlay to close
overlay-close.info: Checking this will cause popup to close when user clicks on overlay

esc-close.label: Press ESC to close
esc-close.info: Checking this will cause popup to close when user presses ESC key

f4-close.label: Press F4 to close
f4-close.info: Checking this will cause popup to close when user presses F4 key

heading.default: Use this space to enter your popup title

description.default: By clicking on the "Subscribe" button, I confirm my agreement with the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use

heading_orders.default: You Haven't Placed Any Orders Yet

text_orders.default: Don’t miss out on amazing deals! Your cart is empty, but we’re here to help you find the perfect products to fill it up.

text_addresses.default: Add your shipping and billing addresses for a smoother checkout experience on your next order.

text.default: Add your shipping and billing addresses for a smoother checkout experience on your next order.

show_share_desktop.label: Show Share block on desktop devices

show_share_mobile.label: Show Share block on mobile and tablet devices

aspect_ratio.info: For layout "Row" the image will stretch to the full height of the block if its height is smaller.

enable_override_image.label: Enable full-width override images for desktop

show_mobile.label: Show sidebar on mobile and tablet devices

banner_text.default: Here can be a short description explaining the content of this banner.

featured_text.content: Applies only if at least one "Featured post" block is added.

featured_info_1.content: The featured post will be shown above the post list.

featured_info_2.content: To have different featured posts for each blog, it's recommended to create separate templates for each one.

options__2.label: Show only when cart is empty

options__3.label: Show only when cart is not empty

title_empty.info: If not entered, the default value will be used.

text_empty.default: Don't miss out on great deals! While your cart is empty, we're here to help you find amazing products to fill it with. Start shopping now!

button_link_empty.info: If not entered, the default value will be used.

button_link_continue.label: Continue shopping button link
button_link_continue.info: If not entered, the default value will be used.

paragraph.content: To change collection descriptions or collection images, [edit your collections.](/admin/collections)

image_products.label: Image for "Products" page
image_products.info: Image for automatically generated page with all products.

tags_to_show.label: Number of product tags
tags_to_show.info: If set to 0, all tags will be displayed.

enable_filtering.label: Enable filtering
enable_filtering.info: Customize filters with the Search and Discovery app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/filters)

enable_price_labels.label: Show price labels under range in price filter

button_filters.label: Button-style filters
button_filters.info: Filter names to show as buttons. The name should not match "Swatch trigger" in "Theme settings → Color swatch". One name per line.

enable_tags.label: Enable filtering
enable_tags.info: Customize filters with the Search and Discovery app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/filters)

description.label: Description
description.default: Here can be a short overview of your featured collections.

collections_sale.label: Sale collections
collections_sale.info: The sale icon will be added to the selected collections.

alt_desc.label: Alternative description
alt_desc.info: It is recommended to add metafield "description" with type "Single line text" for collection in Shopify admin. [About metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields)

show_share_desktop.label: Show Share block on desktop devices

show_share_mobile.label: Show Share block on mobile and tablet devices

show_button.info: Enabling this button be shure that you added Judge.me widget after the Description block and enabled application in "App embeds → Enable Judge.me".

divider.name: Column divider
divider.paragraph: Content before and after this block are divided into two columns (on desktop only).

text.label: Overwrite description
text.info: Leave the field blank to display the standard description.

show_excerpt.label: Show excerpt
show_excerpt.info: Will be displayed above description. To display this feature, create a metafield definition in "Store settings → Custom data → Product metafield definitions" with the namespace "custom.excerpt" and the type set to "Single line text" or "Multi-line text".

reviews_info.content: To enable reviews tab or dropdown add widgets of Judge.me application as blocks and anable application in "App embeds → Enable Judge.me".

reviews_setup.content: Add one widget from the Judge.me application (either the Review Carousel or the Review Widget) right after the Description block to enable dropdown or tab functionality for reviews. Using the Review Carousel widget set max-width to 916px in the application widget settings.

limited_stock.label: Limited stock
limited_stock.info: Marker stock as limited on amount and lower.

picker_type.label: Type
picker_type.info: To enable color swatches, go to "Theme settings → Color swatch → Enable color swatches". Color swatches are displayed only in "Pills" type.

pills_shape.label: Pills shape
pills_shape.info: Not applicable to color swatches. Border radius will be the same as for buttons.

swatch_type.label: Swatch type
swatch_type.info: Applies only to the "Pills" type for color swatches, which are configured in Theme settings → Color swatch.

enable_low_stock_markers.label: Enable out of stock markers for pills type

enable_low_stock_markers_swatches.label: Enable out of stock markers for color swatches

paragraph__notification.content: The notification modal will be opened after the click on the disabled variant. And after the subscribtion by the client it will be send to the merchant's email. This feature is available only for "Pills" type.

additional_text.label: Additional text
additional_text.default: By clicking on the “Subscribe” button, I confirm my agreement with the Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.

size_guide_option_name.label: Option name
size_guide_option_name.info: Option name under which the button to open the popup will appear.

button_page.label: Option popup page
button_page.info: The content of the selected page will be used inside the popup.

show_dynamic_checkout.label: Show dynamic checkout buttons
show_dynamic_checkout.info: Using the payment methods available on your store, customers see their preferred option, like PayPal or Apple Pay. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/using-themes/change-the-layout/dynamic-checkout)

show_gift_card_recipient.label: Show recipient information form for gift card products
show_gift_card_recipient.info: Gift card products can optionally be sent direct to a recipient along with a personal message. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/themes/customizing-themes/add-gift-card-recipient-fields)

paragraph.content: Only if "Show delivery details" is enabled.

custom_liquid.label: Custom liquid
custom_liquid.info: Add app snippets or other Liquid code to create advanced customizations.

heading.label: Heading
heading.default: Here Can Be Your Popup Title

text.label: Text
text.default: Briefly explain what this popup offers.

paragraph__1.content: Dynamic recommendations use order and product information to change and improve over time. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/product-recommendations)

text.default: Here can be a short description explaining the content of this banner.

columns_per_line.label: Columns per line
columns_per_line.info: For desktop devices of "Grid gallery" layout type.

desktop_alignment.label: Desktop product gallery alignment
desktop_alignment.info: For mobile devices gallery will be on the top of the page.

badge_custom_show.label: Show custom badges
badge_custom_show.info: Need to add a metafield "custom.badges" with type "Single line text" in Shopify admin. [About metafields](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/custom-data/metafields)

columns_desktop.label: Number of columns on desktop
columns_desktop.info: Only for gallery types "Top full screen" and "Top with multiple slides". There are only Buy buttons, Variant picker, and Icon with text blocks in the 2nd column.

paragraph_mini_widgets.content: Includes complementary products and Mini card.

mini_widgets_sticky.label: Sticky mini widgets on desktop
mini_widgets_sticky.info: On mobile devices sticky mini widgets will be displayed on the bottom of the page and complementary products will be displayed in the static position.

paragraph_complementary_1.content: To select complementary products, add the Search & Discovery app. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/manual/online-store/search-and-discovery/product-recommendations)

paragraph_complementary_2.content: Products will be displayed if they are not yet added to the cart.

products_limit.label: Products to show
products_limit.info: If the number of complementary products associated with the product is greater than 3 and "Products to show" is greater than 3, the "Slider" layout  will be displayed automatically to fit the viewport height.

heading.default: Here Can Be Your Newsletter Title

description.default: Here can be a brief explanation of what subscribers will receive—whether it’s exclusive offers, product updates, or industry insights.

newsletter_text.label: Additional text
newsletter_text.default: I agree to receive emails and accept the privacy policy.

paragraph.content: When customers subscribe to emails, customer accounts are created. [Learn more](https://help.shopify.com/en/manual/customers)

page.label: Page
page.info: Note that adding a contact page will not display the contact form. The contact form is a separate section.

product_list.label: Products
product_list.info: The product list takes priority over the collection.

text_about_products.content: If no products or collection are selected, all products in the store will be available for the section.

text_about_dynamic.content: If there are more than 50 products in the store or selected collection, products will be dynamically loaded from the collection page. The "Product card" options settings will be unavailable and will follow the settings in the "Product grid" section on the collection page. Additionally, the "Products amount" setting cannot exceed the value set in the "Product grid" section on the collection page.

button_link.info: If empty, the link will be auto-generated based on the selected sorting mode.

sort.label: Sort products by
sort.info: "Featured" and "Best selling" do not work when products are selected using the "Products" setting.

position.label: Position
position.info: Applies only when the Full width setting is disabled.

subheading.default: Here can be a brief introduction

heading.default: Here can be a Compelling Message Summarizing the Section’s Focus

text.default: Here can be a detailed paragraph that expands on the heading, providing insights, background information, or key details.

aspect_ratio.label: Aspect ratio
aspect_ratio.info: When "Adapt to media" option is selected, the aspect ratio applies to the highest media in the blocks.

description.default: Use this space to provide details about what’s being featured in this slide, whether it’s a new launch, a trending product, or an exclusive deal.

height.label: Aspect ratio
height.info: "Adapt to video" only works for Shopify-hosted video

paragraph.content: Shows when no Shopify-hosted video is selected.

video_muted.label: Mute video
video_muted.info: If autoplay is enabled, the sound of the video will be muted.

description.label: Video alt text
description.info: Describe the video to make it accessible for customers using screen readers.

description.default: Here can be a description of what this banner is about.

heading.default: Here Can Be Your Main Title

text.default: Here, you can provide a short description of this column’s focus—whether it’s a product, feature, or promotion.

custom_icon.label: Custom icon
custom_icon.info: Replaces the default icon from the Icon setting.

columns.label: Columns
columns.info: For Row and Overlay collection card layout, the maximum number of columns is 4.

card_color_scheme.label: Collection card color scheme
card_color_scheme.info: Available for Row and Overlay collection card layout.

columns_mobile.info: Available for Column collection card layout.

overlay_opacity.info: Available for Overlay collection card layout.

heading.default: Here can be your before/after title

ticker_link.label: Link
ticker_link.info: If set, the entire ticker will be clickable.
